units.source_text: 1 20個季度預測期間上升⾄最⾼⽔平的累計變動。

units.source_text: 濟衝擊導致消費和投資減少，以及⼤宗商品價格下跌。⼤部分市場的通
units.translation_target_text: Economic shocks have led to reduced consumption and investment, as well as falling commodity prices. Most markets
units.translation_en: Economic shocks have led to reduced consumption and investment, as well as falling commodity prices. Most markets

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Economic shocks have led to reduced consumption and investment, as well as falling commodity prices. Most markets

units.source_text: 脹和利率均低於核⼼境況的⽔平，但美國和墨⻄哥的情況則有所不同，
units.translation_target_text: Inflation and interest rates are both below core-scenario levels, but the situation in the United States and Mexico is different.
units.translation_en: Inflation and interest rates are both below core-scenario levels, but the situation in the United States and Mexico is different.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Inflation and interest rates are both below core-scenario levels, but the situation in the United States and Mexico is different.

units.source_text: 預計加徴關稅和其他反制措施將導致進⼝價格普遍上漲。
units.translation_target_text: The additional tariffs and other countermeasures are expected to lead to a general increase in import prices.
units.translation_en: The additional tariffs and other countermeasures are expected to lead to a general increase in import prices.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The additional tariffs and other countermeasures are expected to lead to a general increase in import prices.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 保護主義政策增加，導致投資減少，國際供應鏈變得複雜，並阻礙
units.translation_target_text: Protectionist policies have increased, reducing investment, complicating international supply chains and hampering
units.translation_en: Protectionist policies have increased, reducing investment, complicating international supply chains and hampering

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Protectionist policies have increased, reducing investment, complicating international supply chains and hampering

units.translation_target_text: Given high valuations (especially in the tech sector), asset prices have corrected sharply, eroding wealth

units.source_text: 效應，最終導致信貸風險上升；
units.translation_target_text: effect, ultimately leading to an increase in credit risk;
units.translation_en: effect, ultimately leading to an increase in credit risk;

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: effect, ultimately leading to an increase in credit risk;

units.source_text: 中東地區衝突範圍擴⼤且情況持續，加上俄烏戰爭，削弱市場信⼼
units.translation_target_text: The scope of conflicts in the Middle East has expanded and continued, coupled with the Russia-Ukraine war, weakening market confidence
units.translation_en: The scope of conflicts in the Middle East has expanded and continued, coupled with the Russia-Ukraine war, weakening market confidence

units.source_text: 中美分歧持續，影響經濟信⼼、環球商品貿易和關鍵科技供應鏈。
units.translation_target_text: Disagreement between China and the United States continues, affecting economic confidence, global commodity trade, and key technology supply chains.

units.translation_target_text: Under a consistent downward trend, tariffs have had a greater impact on the global economy than expected, resulting in lower economic activity.
